description: HR needs to ensure all employees complete their annual mandatory 'Anti-Harassment' training.

nodes.task_description: Assign the 'Anti-Harassment' training module to all active employees in the LMS.

expected_outcome.value: L&D specialist successfully assigns the training.

nodes.task_description: Send communications to all employees about the requirement and the deadline for completion.

expected_outcome.value: Specialist sends announcement and reminder emails.

nodes.task_description: Run a completion report from the LMS and follow up with employees who are not yet compliant.

expected_outcome.value: Specialist generates a report and sends individual reminders to delinquent employees.
